testcase.name: test_request_otp_with_phone_channel_fallback
testcase.failure: tests/test_password_otp_bug_fixes.py:112: in test_request_otp_with_phone_channel_fallback assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Request failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Request failed: {"error":"Too Many Requests","message":"Rate limit exceeded. Please retry after 785 seconds.","retryAfter":785} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_set_password_with_invalid_otp
testcase.failure: tests/test_password_otp_bug_fixes.py:139: in test_set_password_with_invalid_otp assert resp.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 429 E assert 429 == 400 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_set_password_requires_otp_and_password

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing newPassword, got 429 assert 429 == 400 + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_password_otp_bug_fixes.py:162: in test_set_password_requires_otp_and_password assert resp.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for missing newPassword, got {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing newPassword, got 429 E assert 429 == 400 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
